title: 武汉百度机器人出租车被冻结引发报警热潮
summary: A number of Baidu Inc.’s Apollo Go robotaxis suddenly stopped on the streets of China’s Wuhan city on Tuesday, leaving passengers stranded and raising concerns about the safety and reliability of autonomous driving technology.（原题：Baidu Robotaxis Freeze in Wuhan, Sparking Flurry of Police Calls）

title: 新加坡推出 Robotaxis，Grab、文远知行推出无人驾驶汽车
summary: Singapore’s Grab Holdings Ltd. became Southeast Asia’s first ride provider to start a driverless service, betting the technology can help cut costs and prove out robotaxis in dense urban traffic.（原题：Singapore Gets Robotaxis as Grab, WeRide Launch Driverless Cars）
